---
title: "cstar.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/bin/cstar.js"
loc: 19
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.22
style_score: 5.68
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.33
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 5.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 40 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [execa](file://execa)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [join](file://node:path)

### Exports
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `ENTRY_POINT`
- `bootstrap`
